briefdescription.para: Object holding the analysis-wide settings and configurations.
Map storing metadata objects, keyed by a string identifier (e.g., sample label). Initialized empty.
Flag indicating whether the analysis has been started. Initialized to false.
Map to associate file paths or identifiers with user-defined labels. Initialized empty.
Map storing event templates, keyed by a label. Initialized empty.
Map storing metric templates, keyed by a name or identifier. Initialized empty.
Map storing selection templates, keyed by a name or identifier. Initialized empty.
Map storing graph templates, nested by two string keys (e.g., category and label). Initialized empty.
Vector storing names of model sessions (e.g., for different training runs). Initialized empty.
Map storing models configured for inference, keyed by a run name. Initialized empty.
Map storing models for which metrics are to be calculated, keyed by a run name. Initialized empty.
Vector storing tuples of model templates and their optimizer parameters for training sessions. Initialized empty.
Map storing optimizer objects, keyed by a run name or model identifier. Initialized empty.
Map storing model reports (e.g., training progress, evaluation results), keyed by a run name. Initialized empty.
Vector to store pointers to std::thread objects for multithreaded execution. Initialized empty.
Map to track cache status for data, nested by two string keys (e.g., sample and data type). Initialized empty.
Map to indicate whether event building should be skipped for certain samples/labels. Initialized empty.
Map to store types of graphs associated with labels. Initialized empty.
Pointer to a vector of folds_t (tags for data partitioning/versioning). Initialized to nullptr.
Pointer to the dataloader object. Initialized to nullptr.
Pointer to the sampletracer object. Initialized to nullptr.
Pointer to the io object for data input. Initialized to nullptr.
< Public access specifier for the following members.

detaileddescription.para: Constructor for the analysis class. Initializes a new analysis instance.

briefdescription.para: Destructor for the analysis class.

detaileddescription.para: Cleans up resources, such as deleting dynamically allocated objects.

briefdescription.para: Adds data samples to the analysis.

parameterdescription.para: Path to the data sample (file or directory).
A label to identify this sample.

briefdescription.para: Adds a selection template to the analysis.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a selection_template object.

briefdescription.para: Adds an event template to the analysis, associating it with a label.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to an event_template object.
A label to identify this event template.

briefdescription.para: Adds a graph template to the analysis, associating it with a label.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a graph_template object.
A label to identify this graph template.

briefdescription.para: Adds a metric template to the analysis, associating it with a model.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a metric_template object.
Pointer to a model_template object that this metric applies to.

briefdescription.para: Adds a machine learning model and its optimizer parameters to the analysis for training.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a model_template object.
Pointer to an optimizer_params_t object containing optimizer settings.
A name for this training run or model session.

briefdescription.para: Adds a machine learning model to the analysis, typically for inference or metrics without explicit optimizer params here.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a model_template object.
A name for this model session (e.g., for inference or pre-trained model metrics).

briefdescription.para: Attaches or manages threads for parallel processing, if implemented.

detaileddescription.para: Attaches training threads for parallel execution.
This method starts training threads for each optimizer, allowing multiple models to train concurrently when appropriate hardware resources are available.

briefdescription.para: Starts the analysis execution.

detaileddescription.para: This method triggers the main analysis loop, including data processing, model training/inference, etc.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the progress of different analysis tasks or model trainings.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves training progress information for all models.

A map where keys are task/model names and values are vectors of floats representing progress (e.g., percentage or epoch number).
A map of model names to vectors of float values representing progress metrics.
This method collects progress information from all active model training sessions, including metrics like loss and accuracy values over time.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current mode (e.g., training, evaluating) of different analysis tasks.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves the current training mode for all models.

A map where keys are task/model names and values are strings describing the mode.
A map of model names to strings indicating current training mode.
This method provides information about the current operation mode of each training session (e.g., "training", "validation", "inference").

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a textual report of the progress or status of different analysis tasks.

detaileddescription.para: Retrieves detailed progress reports for all models.

A map where keys are task/model names and values are strings containing progress reports.
A map of model names to report strings.
This method provides detailed textual progress reports for each training session, including current metrics, epoch information, and time estimates.

briefdescription.para: Checks if specific analysis tasks or model trainings are complete.

detaileddescription.para: Checks if training is complete for all models.

A map where keys are task/model names and values are booleans (true if complete, false otherwise).
A map of model names to boolean values indicating completion status.
This method determines whether each model training session has completed its specified number of epochs or met other completion criteria.

briefdescription.para: Sets the prefix used in log messages from this instance.

parameterdescription.para: The string to use as a prefix for log messages.

briefdescription.para: Returns the prefix currently used in log messages.
Outputs an info message.

parameterdescription.para: The message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs a warning message.

parameterdescription.para: The warning message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs an error message.

parameterdescription.para: The error message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs a debug message (only in debug mode).

parameterdescription.para: The debug message to output.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Outputs a message with custom formatting.

parameterdescription.para: The message to output.
A custom tag to prepend to the message.
Whether to append a newline (default: true).

briefdescription.para: Enables or disables debug mode.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag, set to true to enable debug messages, false to disable.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current status of debug mode.

simplesect.para: Boolean indicating whether debug mode is enabled (true) or disabled (false).

briefdescription.para: Sets whether warnings should be suppressed.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag, set to true to suppress warnings, false to show them.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current warning suppression status.

simplesect.para: Boolean indicating whether warnings are suppressed (true) or shown (false).

briefdescription.para: Sets whether info messages should be suppressed.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag, set to true to suppress info messages, false to show them.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current info message suppression status.

simplesect.para: Boolean indicating whether info messages are suppressed (true) or shown (false).

briefdescription.para: Splits a string into a vector of substrings based on a delimiter.

parameterdescription.para: The input string to split.
The delimiter.

briefdescription.para: Removes whitespace from the beginning and end of a string.

parameterdescription.para: The string to trim.

briefdescription.para: Gets the type name of a variable as a string (for debugging).

parameterdescription.para: The type to get the name of.

simplesect.para: The name of the type as a string.

inbodydescription.para: < Gets the type name via RTTI.
< Returns the type name.

briefdescription.para: Sums the elements of a vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of elements in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to sum.

inbodydescription.para: < Initialize the output variable.
< Return the sum.

briefdescription.para: < Private access specifier for the following members.

detaileddescription.para: Checks for cached data and potentially loads it to speed up processing.

briefdescription.para: Builds the project structure, possibly setting up directories or initial configurations.
Builds or processes event data based on the added event templates and samples.
Builds or applies event selections based on the added selection templates.
Builds graph representations of the event data based on the added graph templates.
Sets up and configures machine learning model sessions for training or inference.

detaileddescription.para: Builds model sessions for training and inference.

This method initializes model sessions based on configuration settings, sets up optimizers, and transfers data to appropriate devices. It prepares the environment for model training or inference by:
Creating device maps for data tensors
Setting up optimizers with appropriate parameters
Configuring k-fold cross-validation
Distributing training/validation data appropriately

briefdescription.para: Sets up the environment for model inference (prediction).
Builds or calculates metrics for evaluating model performance.

simplesect.para: True if metric building was successful, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Builds or calculates metrics across different data folds (e.g., for k-fold cross-validation).
Builds or configures the data loader for training or evaluation.

parameterdescription.para: Boolean flag, true if for training, false if for evaluation/inference.

briefdescription.para: Fetches tags, possibly related to data versions, processing stages, or k-folds.
Templated helper method to safely clone objects (e.g., event or graph templates).

parameterdescription.para: The type of the object to clone.
Pointer to a map where the cloned object might be stored or looked up.
Pointer to the object to be cloned.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::map< std::string, torch::Tensor * > *data, std::vector< variable_t > *content, int index, std::string prefx, TTree *tt=nullptr)
memberdef.name: add_content

briefdescription.para: Static helper method to add content (features) to a data map from various sources.

detaileddescription.para:
This version likely handles adding features from a TTree to torch::Tensor objects.
data
Pointer to a map where keys are feature names and values are torch::Tensor pointers.
content
Pointer to a vector of variable_t structs describing the features to extract.
index
Current event index or entry number.
prefx
A prefix string for feature names.
tt
Pointer to the TTree to read from (optional, defaults to nullptr).
An integer status code (e.g., 0 for success).

memberdef.argsstring: (std::map< std::string, torch::Tensor * > *data, std::vector< std::vector< torch::Tensor > > *buff, torch::Tensor *edge, torch::Tensor *node, torch::Tensor *batch, std::vector< long > mask)
memberdef.name: add_content

briefdescription.para: Static helper method to add content (features) to a data map from a buffer of tensors.

detaileddescription.para:
This version likely handles adding features from pre-loaded tensor buffers.
data
Pointer to a map where keys are feature names and values are torch::Tensor pointers.
buff
Pointer to a vector of vectors of torch::Tensor (the buffer).
edge
Pointer to a torch::Tensor object for edge features.
node
Pointer to a torch::Tensor object for node features.
batch
Pointer to a torch::Tensor object for batch information.
mask
Vector of long integers representing a mask.

memberdef.argsstring: (model_template *mdx, model_settings_t mds, std::vector< graph_t * > *data, size_t *prg, std::string output, std::vector< variable_t > *content, std::string *msg)
memberdef.name: execution

briefdescription.para: Static method to execute a model (training or inference) on a set of data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the model_template to be executed.
model_settings_t object containing settings for this model execution.
Pointer to a vector of graph_t objects (input data).
Pointer to a size_t variable for progress tracking.
Path or identifier for the output.
Pointer to a vector of variable_t for output content description.
Pointer to a string for status messages.

briefdescription.para: Static method to execute metric calculation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a metric_t object (likely containing metric definitions and results).
Pointer to a size_t variable for progress tracking.
Pointer to a string for status messages.

briefdescription.para: Static method to initialize a training loop for an optimizer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the optimizer object.
The k-fold index or a similar loop identifier.
Pointer to the model_template being trained.
Pointer to the optimizer_params_t for this training session.
Double pointer to a model_report object to store training reports.

briefdescription.para: Prefix used in log messages from this instance. Initialized as empty string.
Flag indicating whether debug mode is enabled. Initialized as false.
Flag indicating whether warnings are suppressed. Initialized as false.
Flag indicating whether info messages are suppressed. Initialized as false.
Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.

parameterdescription.para: The directory path to create.

briefdescription.para: Deletes a directory path and its contents.

parameterdescription.para: The directory path to delete.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a path refers to an existing file.

parameterdescription.para: The path to check.

simplesect.para: True if the path is a file and exists, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Renames a file or directory.

parameterdescription.para: The original path.
The new path.

briefdescription.para: Converts a relative path to an absolute path.

parameterdescription.para: The path to convert.

simplesect.para: The absolute version of the path.

briefdescription.para: Lists files in a directory, optionally filtered by extension.

parameterdescription.para: The directory to search.
File extension filter. If empty, all files are listed.

simplesect.para: A vector of filenames in the directory.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with standard precision.

parameterdescription.para: The double value to convert.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Converts a double value to a string with specified precision.

parameterdescription.para: The double value to convert.
The number of decimal places to consider.

simplesect.para: The string representation of the value.

briefdescription.para: Replaces all occurrences of a substring in a string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to modify.
The substring to replace.
The replacement string.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string contains a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to search for.

simplesect.para: True if the substring is found, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a string ends with a specific substring.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the string to check.
The substring to check for at the end.

simplesect.para: True if the string ends with the substring, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if a vector of strings contains a specific string.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the vector to search.
The string to search for.

simplesect.para: True if the string is found in the vector, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Empties a vector and all objects it points to.

parameterdescription.para: The type of pointers in the vector.
Pointer to the vector to empty.

inbodydescription.para: < Loop through all elements in the vector.
< Delete the object the pointer points to.
< Set the pointer to nullptr to avoid dangling pointers.
< Clear the vector.

briefdescription.para: Fills a vector with pointers from another vector based on a selection index.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects being pointed to.
Pointer to the output vector to fill.
Pointer to the source vector to select from.
Pointer to a vector of indices for selection.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the output vector.
< Reserve space for the output elements.
< Loop through each selected index.
< Get the object at the selected index.
< Add it to the output vector.
< Mark the object as in use.

briefdescription.para: Extracts a specific property from a vector of objects into a new vector.

parameterdescription.para: The type of objects in the source vector.
The type of the property to extract.
Pointer to the output vector to fill with property values.
Pointer to the source vector of objects.
Function pointer to extract the property from an object.

inbodydescription.para: < Clear the properties vector.
< Reserve space for the property values.
< Loop through each object in the source vector.
< Create a default-initialized property variable.
< Call the provided function to extract the property.
< Add the property value to the output vector.

briefdescription.para: < Inherits from the tools class for utility functions.

detaileddescription.para: Orchestrates the entire physics analysis workflow.

The analysis class is the main driver for performing a physics analysis. It manages the configuration, data processing, model execution, and result collection. Users interact with this class to define the analysis steps, add samples, specify models, and run the analysis.

node.label: cproperty< std::vector< std::string >, std::map< std::string, torch::Tensor * > >
std::map< std::string, std::map< graph_enum, std::vector< std::string > > >
std::map< std::string, std::map< int, std::map< int, std::string > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < std::string, std::map< int, std::map< int, std::string > > >

node.label: std::map< std::string, std::map< mode_enum, std::vector< graph_t * > * > >
std::map< std::string, std::map< std::string, std::map< std::string, std::vector< std::string > > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < std::string, std::map< std::string, std::map< std::string, std::vector< std::string > > > >

node.label: function< void(std::vector< std::string > *, std::map< std::string, torch::Tensor * > *)>
map< std::string, std::map< std::string, std::vector< std::string > > >
